title: Eval Summary
description: CPL-03 Eval Summary: deterministic, fail-closed evaluation record over a transcript_artifact + context_bundle pair. Carries one structured eval_results entry per required eval_name and an overall_status (pass|fail). This artifact does not assert routing; it is consumed by the gate_evidence artifact and by downstream review surfaces. No authority vocabulary is permitted in this schema.

artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for this eval_summary artifact.

evaluated_artifact_ids.description: IDs of the artifacts evaluated by this summary (transcript_artifact + context_bundle, in that order).

eval_results.description: One entry per executed eval. Required eval_names must all appear; missing entries are surfaced as overall_status=fail.

overall_status.description: Aggregated status over eval_results. Fail-closed: any individual fail or any missing required eval_name yields fail.

missing_eval_names.description: Required eval names that did not appear in eval_results. Non-empty implies overall_status=fail.

reason_codes.description: Aggregated structured reason codes (e.g., MISSING_REQUIRED_EVALS, EVAL_CASE_FAILED).

eval_name.description: Canonical eval name executed against the input artifacts.

status.description: Per-eval status. Indeterminate is recorded as fail (fail-closed).

reason_codes.description: Structured reason codes for the eval result. Empty list when status=pass.

detail.description: Optional human-readable detail; not consumed by downstream logic.

evaluated_artifact_id.description: Artifact this individual eval was executed against (e.g., the context_bundle id).
